title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account, preferences, and security.

profile.title: Profile
profile.unavailable: Could not load your profile. Some details may be out of date.

security.title: Security
security.changePasswordHint: After changing your password, all devices must sign in again.

tier.title: Account tier
tier.currentIsPremiumInfo: Thanks for using Premium. You have every feature unlocked.
tier.upgradeInfo: Premium unlocks wallets, payout QR codes, and extended exports. There is no self-serve purchase — upgrades are granted manually by an administrator, so please contact the operator.
tier.premiumPerks: Premium adds: wallets and payout QR codes, higher free-tier limits, and extended data exports.
